# Tuft

> All-in-One Community Platform for Leaders

Tuft is a privacy-first community platform designed for educators, webinar hosts, and content creators. It streamlines communication, file sharing, payments, and analytics.

## Core Features

- **Signal (Feed)**: Admin-only broadcast feed for priority alerts and announcements.
- **Threads (Chat)**: Organized topical sub-channels with native HD media sharing.
- **Meetings**: Native HD video meetings with unlimited duration.
- **The Vault (Files)**: Intelligent cloud storage with smart folders and version history.
- **Payments**: Automated subscription billing and daily settlements.
- **Polls & Forms**: Interactive data collection and community engagement tools.

## Target Audience

- **Educators**: Managing coaching academies and tuition centers.
- **Content Creators**: Building private communities on Instagram, YouTube, and WhatsApp.
- **Webinar Hosts**: Delivering high-quality virtual sessions.
